evaluation_method: Language modeling evaluation on WikiText-103, a dataset of over 103 million tokens extracted from verified Good and Featured Wikipedia articles. Unlike Penn Treebank, WikiText-103 retains original casing, numbers, and punctuation, with a vocabulary of 267,735 tokens. The dataset preserves full articles enabling evaluation of long-term dependency modeling. Evaluation uses perplexity computed via rolling log-likelihoods on the test set. In lm-evaluation-harness, word_perplexity, byte_perplexity, and bits_per_byte are reported.
